message.content:
{
  "page_type": "text_scan",
  "summary": "This page is a continuation of a manual section titled 'Color Image Display Control Center (Continued)' for a YK E type centrifugal chiller unit. It describes the functions of various control keys and navigation options, including VSD frequency control, guide vane control, and navigation to main or compressor interfaces.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Title: 彩色图像显示控制中心（续） YK E型离心式冷水机组"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Function: 增加 (Increase) - VSD frequency control manual mode"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Function: 减小 (Decrease) - VSD frequency control manual mode"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Function: [导流叶片]打开(手动) (Guide Vane Open Manual)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Function: [导流叶片]关闭(手动) (Guide Vane Close Manual)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Function: [导流叶片]保持位置(手动) (Guide Vane Hold Position Manual)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Function: [导流叶片]打开(自动) (Guide Vane Open Automatic)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Navigation: 导航 (Navigation) - 主界面 (Main Interface)"},
    {"type": "text_block", "label": "Navigation: 压缩机 (Compressor) - 返回压缩机界面"},
    {"type": "icon", "label": "Snowflake symbol (top left)"},
    {"type": "page_number", "label": "26"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["control_interface", "operator_instructions", "system_navigation"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "彩色图像显示控制中心（续） YK E型离心式冷水机组\n增加\n这个键使 VSD 频率控制进入手动模式，以规定的增量增加当前的频率指令值。但频率值不会超出最大允许频率。\n减小\n这个键使 VSD 频率控制进入手动模式，以规定的减少量减小当前的频率指令值。但频率值不会低于 1Hz。\n[导流叶片]打开(手动)\n这个键使导流叶片控制进入手动模式，并向触点发送打开的指令。\n[导流叶片]关闭(手动)\n这个键使导流叶片控制进入手动模式，并向触点发送关闭的指令。\n[导流叶片]保持位置(手动)\n这个键使导流叶片控制进入手动模式，并向触点发送保持位置的指令。\n[导流叶片]打开(自动)\n这个键使导流叶片控制进入自动模式。\n导航\n主界面\n要求访问级别：观察\n直接返回主界面。\n压缩机\n要求访问级别：观察\n返回压缩机界面。\n制冷百家网：www.zhilengbj.cn\n26",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The page is purely textual with no diagrams or schematics. Relationships between entities are not visually depicted; they are described in text. The 'visual_relationships' field is empty as no connections are shown.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This page is a continuation of a manual section titled 'Color Image Display Control Center (Continued)' for a YK E type centrifugal chiller unit. It describes the functions of various control keys and navigation options, including VSD frequency control, guide vane control, and navigation to main or compressor interfaces.

visual_entities.label: Title: 彩色图像显示控制中心（续） YK E型离心式冷水机组
Function: 增加 (Increase) - VSD frequency control manual mode
Function: 减小 (Decrease) - VSD frequency control manual mode
Function: [导流叶片]打开(手动) (Guide Vane Open Manual)
Function: [导流叶片]关闭(手动) (Guide Vane Close Manual)
Function: [导流叶片]保持位置(手动) (Guide Vane Hold Position Manual)
Function: [导流叶片]打开(自动) (Guide Vane Open Automatic)
Navigation: 导航 (Navigation) - 主界面 (Main Interface)
Navigation: 压缩机 (Compressor) - 返回压缩机界面

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
彩色图像显示控制中心（续） YK E型离心式冷水机组
增加
这个键使 VSD 频率控制进入手动模式，以规定的增量增加当前的频率指令值。但频率值不会超出最大允许频率。
减小
这个键使 VSD 频率控制进入手动模式，以规定的减少量减小当前的频率指令值。但频率值不会低于 1Hz。
[导流叶片]打开(手动)
这个键使导流叶片控制进入手动模式，并向触点发送打开的指令。
[导流叶片]关闭(手动)
这个键使导流叶片控制进入手动模式，并向触点发送关闭的指令。
[导流叶片]保持位置(手动)
这个键使导流叶片控制进入手动模式，并向触点发送保持位置的指令。
[导流叶片]打开(自动)
这个键使导流叶片控制进入自动模式。
导航
主界面
要求访问级别：观察
直接返回主界面。
压缩机
要求访问级别：观察
返回压缩机界面。
制冷百家网：www.zhilengbj.cn
26
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The page is purely textual with no diagrams or schematics. Relationships between entities are not visually depicted; they are described in text. The 'visual_relationships' field is empty as no connections are shown.
